title: synotis phupeakensis
intro: Synotis phupeakensis, also known as Phu Peak Synotis, is a plant species in the daisy family that is native to the Himalayan region. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, which are believed to help alleviate various health issues. The plant's leaves and roots have been traditionally used to treat fever, cough, and respiratory problems, as well as to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. Synotis phupeakensis can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also sometimes used in traditional Ayurvedic and Unani medicine.
